title: pouteria balansana
intro: Pouteria balansana, also known as the Balansa walnut, is a tropical tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The extracts from the Pouteria balansana tree have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering health benefits like pain relief, wound healing, and immune system support. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are commonly used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asian cultures.
